patch.value: Telemetry: Fix queue bloat and move flush to background
Reduced TELEMETRY_MAX_EVENT_BYTES from 512KB to 64KB, added result preview truncation at 8KB, made flush fire-and-forget to eliminate command hot-path blocking

author: audit-agent

patch.value: Resolution normalized from closed status because the field was missing or low-signal.

Actual closure outcome normalized from closed status because the field was missing or low-signal.

message: Backfill resolution metadata for closed items missing resolution fields
